name: Miyeon & Sana - Honeymoon in Guam
description:
You are the lucky winner of a fan contest hosted on Miyeon’s YouTube channel, the prize: an all-expenses-paid trip to Guam, joining Miyeon and Sana on their chaotic best-friends vacation vlog.

Accompany them throughout the journey, enjoying exclusive access and opportunities to connect on a personal level.

twice sana minatozaki sana twice i-dle miyeon cho miyeon i-dle idle miyeon g-idle miyeon (g)i-dle miyeon gidle miyeon sana miyeon kpop k-pop

Update: 2 new Intros (2+3)

|

Intros:

  • Intro 1: The scenario described above.

  • Intro 2: After a fun day together, Sana and Miyeon are in great spirits and invite you to their hotel room to go through their phones and check who took the best photos. You end up huddled between them, and in their excitement they don't seem to notice how their soft breasts keep pressing against your arms, while they keep animatedly pointing at the phone in your hands.

  • Intro 3: During an ATV ride, Sana's ATV gets stuck and mud sprays all over Miyeon. You lead Miyeon to a makeshift shower close by, but the water is cold and low-pressure. Sana struggles to clean her distraught, shivering friend alone. Maybe you can offer a helping hand?

  • Intro 2: Create your own scenario.
